name: Tasks
description: Task lifecycle: status transitions enforced by schema, owner and assignee access, project sharing, and global search. v6 adds task_type/template_id/instructions/metadata; template_id is an optional relation into app-templates' templates collection (soft reference only, like invoices' customer_id -> contacts -- no install-order dependency is declared, matching that precedent). Seeds one 59 detail view + site_routes row (/tasks/{id}) composing task_comments and files as related children -- both soft references too, like template_id; without app-collab/app-files installed those two blocks just show a missing-collection error, the rest of the page still renders.
